# New Atlantis

*[Francis Bacon](../philosophers/bacon.md) · 1627*

An unfinished utopia in which travelers discover the island of Bensalem, organized around "Salomon's House," a collective research institution that places organized science in the service of the common good. Bacon there sketches the dream of a cooperative knowledge turned toward public benefit.
